x-enumeration-literals.name: Deposit
x-enumeration-literals.description: Incoming funds placed into an account, such as cash, check, or electronic deposits.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Withdrawal
x-enumeration-literals.description: Outgoing funds from an account, including cash withdrawals or electronic transfers.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Transfer
x-enumeration-literals.description: Movement of funds between accounts, either within the same institution or to another account.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Cross Border
x-enumeration-literals.description: Transactions involving parties in different jurisdictions or countries. Often subject to enhanced monitoring for AML or sanctions compliance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Loan Origination
x-enumeration-literals.description: Initiation of a new loan or credit facility, requiring compliance checks on the borrower.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Investment Purchase
x-enumeration-literals.description: Acquisition of investment products (e.g., securities, bonds, mutual funds), which may trigger regulatory and suitability checks.
